zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Waldegrave於1400年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Waldegrave42歲，母親Jane De Vauncy36歲。他於1419年與Joane de Durward在英國素福爾可布勒斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1454年5月2日在英國素福爾可素德波利享年54歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Waldegrave于1400年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Waldegrave42岁，母亲Jane De Vauncy36岁。他于1419年与Joane de Durward在英国素福爾可布勒斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1454年5月2日在英国素福爾可素德波利享年54岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Waldegrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Walgrave (Northants), which is recorded as Waldgrave in 1086.

variants.name: Woolgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a late variant of   Waldegrave  .

variants.name: Allgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a variant of   Waldegrave  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Waldegrave was born in 1400, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Waldegrave, was 42 and his mother, Jane De Vauncy, was 36. He married Joane de Durward in 1419, in Bures, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 May 1454, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Suffolk, England.

fr.Smallbridge, Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk,: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Waldegrave est né en 1400, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Waldegrave, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Jane De Vauncy, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Joane de Durward en 1419, à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1454, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Smallbridge, Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk,: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Waldegrave 1400 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Waldegrave 42 und seine Mutter Jane De Vauncy 36. Er hat 1419 in Bures, Suffolk, England Joane de Durward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Mai 1454 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Sudbury, Suffolk, England und wurde in Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Waldegrave è nato il nel 1400 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Waldegrave, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Jane De Vauncy, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Joane de Durward nel 1419, nel Bures, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1454, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, England.

ja.Waldegrave, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Waldegraveが1400年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Waldegraveは42歳，母Jane De Vauncyは36歳であった。1419年にイギリススフォルクブレスでJoane de Durwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1454年5月2日にイギリススフォルクスドブリーで54歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.Smallbridge, Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk,: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Waldegrave(이)가 1400년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Waldegrave(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane De Vauncy(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1419년 영국 수폴크 버스에서 Joane de Durward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1454년 5월 2일 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.Smallbridge, Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk,: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Waldegrave nasceu em 1400, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Waldegrave, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Jane De Vauncy, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane de Durward em 1419, em Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1454, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Smallbridge, Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk,: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Smallbridge, Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk,: буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Waldegrave родился в 1400 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Waldegrave было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Jane De Vauncy, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane de Durward в 1419 г. в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 мая 1454 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Waldegrave nació en 1400, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Waldegrave, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Jane De Vauncy, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Joane de Durward en 1419, en Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1454, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra.
